title: prostanthera teretifolia
intro: Prostanthera teretifolia, also known as the Westringia or the Narrow-leaved Westringia, is a shrub native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Prostanthera teretifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues and relieve respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Prostanthera teretifolia is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
